owner_authorization: The owner authorized B6 machinery and gate creation on 2026-07-24. This authorization excludes reading market returns, falsification execution, validation access, broker/provider activity, paid action, paper trade, and real-money action.
overlay_rule: Load and validate v2 and v3 independently; v3 overrides only the time-index contract and v2 remains the sole source of primary inference, DSR, MinTRL, trial inventory, and decision matrix.

execution_contract.shared_decision_index: At decision close t, candidate and matched comparator both use exactly r[t-k] for k=0..h-1 for each matched horizon h.
execution_contract.future_return_prohibition: No signal, target weight, or decision input may use r[t+1] or a later return.
execution_contract.execution: Execute both t-index targets at the official close of the next actual NYSE session t+1; same-close execution is forbidden.
execution_contract.active_return: Candidate and matched-comparator net returns use identical post-execution effective windows; their difference is the sole primary inference series.
execution_contract.primary_inference: Inherit v2 paired daily net active-return Sharpe, annual-to-daily Sharpe conversion, PSR, DSR, dual MinTRL, five-trial inventory, and falsification decision matrix without substitution.

data_boundary.B6_1_required_container_metadata: A separately approved falsification-only container must prove max_date <= 2015-12-31 before any return row is parsed; validation rows are forbidden.

hard_stops: Any market return, backtest, or falsification execution during B6.
Any B6.1 activation gate absent, invalid, or not separately owner-approved.
Any validation price, return, signal, position, regime, benchmark, or PnL observation.
Any v2/v3 hash, validator, manifest, overlay, time-index, or falsification-window mismatch.
Any broker/provider request, credential use, paid action, paper trade, or real-money action.
Any edge, E2, execution-quality, deployment, or real-money claim.
next_safe_action: After this contract is committed and Hermetic CI passes, request separate owner approval for a new B6.1 activation gate before any falsification-only container is inspected or execution code is added.
